allow: PowerShell(netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name="Complexo Desportivo 3100" dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=3100)

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList "-Command `"netsh advfirewall firewall add rule name='Complexo Desportivo 3100' dir=in action=allow protocol=TCP localport=3100; Write-Host 'Regra criada com sucesso!'`"" -Wait)
